_comment: VS Code equivalent of .opencode/plugins/sce-agent-trace.ts. VS Code has no native 'session.diff' event; PostToolUse is the closest. The script receives JSON on stdin containing tool_name, tool_input, tool_response. Filter for edit-producing tools (editFiles, applyPatch, create_file, replace_string_in_file, etc.), compute or read the resulting diff, and pipe it into the existing 'sce hooks diff-trace' CLI (or replace with the desired tracing target). Reference docs: https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/hooks
